title: Advanced Biometric Data Security Policy
scenario: Design an advanced biometric data security policy incorporating multi-factor authentication, encryption at rest and in transit, and anomaly detection. The policy should cater to a large-scale enterprise with diverse user groups. Generate a comprehensive security policy document in standard business report format. Ensure the output is under 500 words and includes clear section headings and concise bullet points.
constraints: Must include a detailed section on compliance with relevant regulations
Must be written in a professional business tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the output adheres to all specified formatting and content constraints.
Judge the professionalism and clarity of the policy language.
Check that the policy includes necessary compliance information and adheres to relevant regulations.
